description: Local supply-chain install gate for npm packages and VS Code extensions with Socket, Codex, and PI review support.
commit_message:
Adopt dark coral landing page (proposal 5) (#6)

* Add five UI design proposals on routes /1–/5

Downloaded the Anthropic frontend-design skill into .cursor/skills for
distinctive, production-grade layout guidance.

Each proposal is a full landing-page alternate for Supply Chain Guard with
the same sections and interactivity (terminal demo, screenshot tabs, copy
buttons) but a unique visual direction:

- /1 brutalist terminal noir
- /2 editorial magazine
- /3 retro-futuristic cyber
- /4 organic
